name: rOt
short_description: Minimal puzzle game which goal is to get The Ball to the WinBox using the Circles in the scenes. New obstacles introduced every 10 levels
detailed_description:
Minimal puzzle game which goal is to get The Ball to the WinBox using the Circles in the scenes. New obstacles introduced every 10 levels.


- HD Resolution
- 30+ Levels
- Simple Interface
- Steam Achievements
- 'One Chance' mode: You have only one chance. If you fail, it's over.

Controls: Arrows and Spacebar


Inspired by the amazing game qop
Music by: Cleyton Kauffman - OpenGameArt - doppelganger

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Danish, Finnish, Greek, Dutch, Hungarian, Japanese, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Swedish, Thai, Czech, Turkish, Ukrainian, Arabic
